name: room99-feed-duplicator
description: Pobiera feed Google PL z FeedOptimise i dodaje duplikaty produktow z roznymi tytulami (A/B testing) dla Google Shopping. Zero kosztow w FeedOptimise.

scripts.test: echo 'Test: download feed and verify duplicates' && node generate-feed.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const out=fs.readFileSync('output/google-pl-with-test-titles.tsv','utf-8').split('\n');console.log('Total rows:',out.length-1);console.log('Sample dup:',out.find(l=>l.includes('_t1')));"
